processing file: example.Rmd
  |.................                                                         |  23%
   ordinary text without R code

  |.................................                                        |  45%
label: setup
  |..................................................                       |  68%
   ordinary text without R code

  |..................................................................       |  90%
label: plot
  |..........................................................................| 100%
   ordinary text without R code

output file: example.knit.md

/opt/homebrew/bin/pandoc +RTS -K512m -RTS example.knit.md --to html5 --from markdown+autolink_bare_uris+tex_math_single_backslash --output example.html --lua-filter ... --standalone --self-contained

Output created: example.html
